annotation.reason: Added a § 'Prior art — reuse before build' section enumerating candidate OSS projects (Annotorious, Recogito, Hypothes.is, W3C Web Annotation Data Model, Penpot, Storybook, html2canvas, getDisplayMedia, with Marker.io/Pastel/BugHerd flagged as inform-only since they're closed-source). Defined six concrete research deliverables (annotation data model decision, image annotation UI decision, HTML mockup annotation UI decision, threaded comments decision, screenshot capture decision, combined recommendation document at docs/studio-design/ACCEPTED/<date>-graphical-review-prior-art/brief.md). Inserted a new Phase 1 in Tasks ('Prior art research + build-vs-reuse decision') — time-boxed, no production implementation, output is the decision doc that informs Phase 8 (annotation model) and Phase 9 (frontend-design pass). Renumbered all subsequent phases; Phase 8, 9, 10, 11 reference the Phase 1 decision explicitly so the research feeds forward.
